item.name: Microsoft Azure Post Subscriptions Subscriptionid Providers Microsoft Dbforpostgresql Checknameavailability

request.description: Checks availability of a cluster name. Cluster names should be globally unique; at least 3 characters and at most 40 characters long; they must only contain lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens; and must not start or end with a hyphen.

response.name: OK

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2
